etymology.description: śįĶ(śįĶ) (shu«ź, "water") + ŚįÉ(ŚįÉ) (fŇę, phonetic) = water + phonetic element -> widespread
etymology.interpretation: The character śļ•(p«Ē, "widespread") combines the semantic element śįĶ(śįĶ) (shu«ź, "water"), indicating a liquid or spreading quality, with the phonetic component ŚįÉ(ŚįÉ) (fŇę), which provides the pronunciation. This reflects the sense of water spreading or a widespread notion.
